title: Gluten-Free Smoky Frittata
description: A smoky twist on the classic Italian dish, perfect for a quick and easy breakfast or brunch. Made with scrambled eggs, smoky cheese, and a hint of spice.
instructions: Whisk the eggs, salt, and black pepper in a large bowl. Set aside.
In a large skillet, melt 1 tablespoon of butter over medium heat.
Add the shredded smoky cheese and cook, stirring occasionally, until melted and slightly browned.
Pour the whisked eggs over the cheese and cook until the edges start to set.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 12-15 minutes, or until the eggs are set.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes.
Use a spatula to carefully loosen the edges of the frittata from the skillet.
Slide the frittata onto a serving plate and garnish with chopped parsley.
